title: Add backtest/runner.py

modifications: Added plotly import with fallback for chart generation
Updated _fetch_historical_data() to support configurable interval and limit (default: 5m, 500 bars)
Updated _backtest_symbol() to use 5m interval and 500 bars as per T-071 requirements
Added build_equity_chart() method using plotly with equity curve + drawdown subplots
Added save_equity_chart() method to export charts as HTML
Updated run() method to auto-generate and save equity charts after backtest

methods_implemented: _backtest_symbol() - Run backtest for single symbol (T-071: uses 5m interval, 500 bars)
build_equity_chart() - Generate plotly equity curve + drawdown chart (NEW)
integrations: plotly - For chart generation (with graceful fallback)

git_commit: T-071: Add backtest/runner.py with chart generation and 5m interval support
notes: Enhanced existing backtest/runner.py with T-071 requirements: 500 bars of 5m K-lines, plotly equity curve + drawdown charts, auto-save to HTML
